tags.name: `mc-accordion-item`
tags.description: Purpose: A customizable item for the mc-accordion component that can be expanded or collapsed to show or hide content. Category: Content Display When to use: FAQs, Nested content, Disclosure sections When not to use: Always expanded content, Simple lists Works with components: mc-avatar, mc-button-group, mc-button, mc-card, mc-checkbox, mc-drawer, mc-input, mc-list, mc-notification, mc-radio, mc-segmented-control, mc-select, mc-switch, mc-table, mc-textarea Alternative component names: Accordion, Collapsible Panel, Expandable Section Events: * `accordionitemtoggle` {`CustomEvent<{ expanded: boolean; id: string; }>`} - Slots: * ``heading`` {} - The heading HTML to use for the accordion item heading * ``body`` {} - The body HTML to use for the accordion item content * ``icon`` {} - The icon HTML * ``trailingicon`` {} - The trailing icon HTML Attributes: * `height` {`number | "auto"`} - * `id` {string} - Unique id for the accordion item (used for accessibility) * `heading` {string} - Heading of the accordion item. No heading will be shown, if attribute is not supplied. * `body` {string} - Body can be passed as simple argument like: `body="simple text"` or as a default slot: `body text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short body text, use named slot when you want to pass body with HTML text * `expanded` {boolean} - The state of the accordion item. * `expandiconposition` {ExpandIconPosition} - Position of the expand icon. * `icon` {`string | undefined`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the heading. * `trailingicon` {`string | undefined`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the heading. * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component. Properties: * `uniqueId` {`string`} - * `height` {`number | "auto"`} - * `accordionItemId` {`string`} - * `id` {string} - Unique id for the accordion item (used for accessibility) * `heading` {string} - Heading of the accordion item. No heading will be shown, if attribute is not supplied. * `body` {string} - Body can be passed as simple argument like: `body="simple text"` or as a default slot: `body text as HTML`. Use argument style for passing short body text, use named slot when you want to pass body with HTML text * `expanded` {boolean} - The state of the accordion item. * `expandiconposition` {ExpandIconPosition} - Position of the expand icon. * `icon` {`string | undefined`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the heading. * `trailingicon` {`string | undefined`} - Icon to be displayed alongside the heading. * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

attributes.description:
`height` {`number | "auto"`} - 

Property: height

Default: auto

attributes.description:

Property: expanded

Default: false

Property: expandiconposition

Default: right
